title: IbukiGourd
body: # IBUKI GOURD `IbukiGourd` is a `Minecraft Fabric MOD` primarily written in `kotlin`, mainly providing prerequisite features for other MODs. `Config Manage` `Config GUI` `Command DSL` `GUI DSL` Dependent: - [Fabric API](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric) - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://github.com/FabricMC/fabric-language-kotlin/) [Details](https://github.com/forpleuvoir/ibuki_gourd/blob/dev/README-ENG.md)
